hooks.command: node tools/surface.mjs >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'docs/SURFACE.md regenerated (fresh reuse-surface catalog). Before writing ANY src/ code: consult it + grep for the concept (CLAUDE.md "Reuse before you write").' || echo 'surface.mjs FAILED - run node tools/surface.mjs manually and check it before writing src/ code.'
